name: Riverside Garden Lawns
description: Sprawling open-air garden lawn on the riverside, ideal for large weddings and receptions of up to 400 guests. Includes landscaped gardens, a covered stage, ample parking and a backup indoor hall in case of rain. Premium pricing.

name: Grand Orchid Banquet Hall
description: Fully air-conditioned indoor banquet hall seating 250 guests, with in-house lighting, a dance floor and valet parking. A reliable all-weather choice for weddings and receptions on a moderate budget.

name: TechPark Conference Center
description: Professional conference center with tiered seating for 300, high-speed wifi, dual projectors, breakout rooms and on-site AV support. Built for corporate conferences, product launches and seminars.

name: Cozy Rooftop Lounge
description: Stylish rooftop lounge with skyline views, perfect for birthday parties, cocktail evenings and small gatherings of up to 80 guests. Includes a bar counter and ambient lighting.

name: Heritage Palace Hall
description: Opulent heritage palace hall for grand luxury weddings of up to 500 guests. Features chandeliers, royal decor, bridal suites and premium hospitality. High-end budget required.

name: Sunrise Community Hall
description: Affordable, no-frills indoor community hall seating 150 guests. A budget-friendly pick for birthdays, anniversaries and small family functions. Basic sound system included.

name: Spice Route Catering
description: Full-service multi-cuisine caterer offering North Indian, South Indian and Chinese buffets, both veg and non-veg, at 850 INR per plate. Popular for weddings and large receptions.

name: Green Leaf Pure Veg
description: Pure vegetarian caterer specializing in North Indian, Gujarati and Jain menus at 550 INR per plate. A cost-effective, vegetarian-friendly option for traditional functions.

name: Continental Bites
description: Premium continental and Italian caterer with gourmet finger food and live counters at 1200 INR per plate. Favored for corporate events and cocktail parties.

name: Budget Tiffin Co.
description: Economical caterer for small parties and birthdays at 350 INR per plate, offering simple North Indian meals and snack platters.

name: Bloom & Bliss Decor
description: Luxury floral and theme decorator for weddings, including stage design, mandap, floral walls and entrance arches. Flat package from 120000 INR.

name: EventGlow Lighting & Decor
description: Modern lighting, balloon and backdrop decor suited to corporate events and birthdays. Affordable flat package from 45000 INR.

name: DJ Pulse
description: Professional DJ with sound system and lighting rig for weddings, birthdays and parties. Flat fee 40000 INR for a full evening.

name: Live Acoustic Trio
description: Three-piece live acoustic band for corporate dinners and cocktail receptions. Elegant background and feature sets. Flat fee 60000 INR.

name: Candid Frames Studio
description: Wedding photography and cinematic videography team offering candid coverage, drone shots and a same-day highlight reel. Package from 80000 INR.

name: SnapEvents Coverage
description: Affordable event photography for corporate functions and birthdays, including edited digital album. Package from 30000 INR.
